name: CATO CORP
business: The company operates fashion specialty stores under names Cato, Cato Fashions, Cato Plus, It's Fashion, It's Fashion Metro and Versona, selling apparel and accessories at low prices every day to fashion and value-conscious customers, primarily in the southeastern United States.

exposures.sentence: The Cato concept seeks to offer quality fashion apparel and accessories at low prices every day, in junior/missy and plus sizes.

The Cato concept’s stores and e-commerce website feature a broad assortment of apparel and accessories, including dressy, career, and casual sportswear, dresses, coats, shoes, lingerie, costume jewelry and handbags.
The Company offers its own credit card and layaway plan.

A security breach that results in unauthorized access to or disclosure of employee, Company or customer information or a ransomware attack could adversely affect our costs, reputation and results of operations, and efforts to mitigate these risks may continue to increase our costs.
We are exploring incorporating artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities into the development of technologies, our business operations and our merchandise.
